name: Grandma's Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, beat together softened butter, eggs, apple juice, and applesauce until creamy.
2. Add flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon to the mixture. Beat well.
3. If desired, stir in raisins.
4. Oil and flour an 8-inch square baking pan.
5. Line the bottom of the pan with thinly sliced apples (one layer deep).
6. Spoon batter over the apples and smooth the top.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes or until well-browned.
8. Invert onto a wire rack to cool, apple side up.
9. Serve apple side up on individual dessert plates and spoon warm applesauce over each portion.
